evals.prompt: /storytelling ช่วยทำ slide เรื่อง digital transformation ของ IFCG ให้ board อนุมัติงบ 5 ล้าน นำเสนอ 15 นาที สีน้ำเงินเข้มของบริษัท
evals.expected_output: storytelling.json with canvas object + ~12 beats, pitch storyline, supplier audience_type, assertion headlines, speaker scripts with transitions, SUCCESS elements tagged per beat

assertions.text: Output is valid JSON that can be parsed
JSON has a 'canvas' root key (not 'presentation') containing at minimum: topic, audience, audience_type, goal, one_big_idea, storyline
JSON has a 'beats' root key (not 'slides') containing a non-empty array
Beat count is 8-15 (reasonable for 15 min at ~1-2 min per beat)
canvas.audience_type is 'supplier' — board controls budget, not implementors
canvas.audience_analysis has before and after objects, each with think, feel, know, want fields
canvas.one_big_idea is a complete sentence (not a topic label) — at least 8 words
canvas.common_ground is present and non-empty
canvas.reward has personal, sphere, and humanity fields — all non-empty
canvas.star_moment_index is a number pointing to a beat with success_element 'star_moment'
Every beat has a 'headline' that is a complete sentence — at least 5 words, not just a topic label
Every beat has a 'script' field with at least 30 words
All non-first beats have transition_in and all non-last beats have transition_out (null only for first/last)
Middle beats (not opening/divider/reward/cta) have success_element tagged — covering at least 4 different SUCCESS elements across the deck
Beats collectively cover beginning (opening/problem), middle (evidence/solution), and end (reward/cta) — story_role fields span the full arc
At least some beats have sparkline_position alternating between what_is and what_could_be — appropriate for pitch storyline

evals.prompt: /storytelling ผมมีเนื้อหาจาก NotebookLM เรื่อง กลยุทธ์ฟื้นฟู IFCG สร้างทีมขายใหม่ อยากทำ presentation สอนพนักงานใหม่ 20 คน ประมาณ 10 นาที ไม่ต้อง formal มาก
evals.expected_output: storytelling.json with canvas + ~8 beats, explanation storyline, doer audience_type, casual tone, progressive complexity, assertion headlines, speaker scripts

assertions.text: Output is valid JSON that can be parsed
JSON has a 'canvas' root key containing at minimum: topic, audience, audience_type, goal, one_big_idea, storyline
JSON has a 'beats' root key containing a non-empty array
Beat count is 6-12 (reasonable for 10 min presentation)
canvas.audience_type is 'doer' — new employees will implement, not approve
canvas.audience_analysis has before and after objects with think, feel, know, want fields
canvas.storyline is 'explanation' — progressive complexity, not pitch alternation
canvas.tone is casual/friendly and scripts use approachable language
Every beat has a 'headline' that is a complete sentence — at least 5 words
Every beat has a 'script' field with at least 30 words
All non-first beats have transition_in and all non-last beats have transition_out
Middle beats have success_element tagged — at least simplicity and concreteness present for an explanation storyline

evals.prompt: /storytelling ต้อง present ให้ลูกค้า 5 นาที เรื่อง Glu+Me แอป AI สำหรับ รพ.สต. ลูกค้าเป็นหมอและพยาบาลที่ไม่ค่อยเก่งเทค อยากให้เขา pilot ใช้งาน
evals.expected_output: storytelling.json with canvas + ~5-7 beats, pitch storyline, supplier/innovator audience_type, simple language, concrete examples, clear CTA for pilot signup

assertions.text: Output is valid JSON that can be parsed
JSON has a 'canvas' root key containing topic, audience, audience_type, goal, one_big_idea, storyline
JSON has a 'beats' root key containing a non-empty array
Beat count is 4-8 (reasonable for 5 min)
canvas.audience_analysis captures that doctors/nurses are non-tech-savvy — reflected in before.know or before.feel
canvas.one_big_idea is a complete sentence focused on benefit to healthcare workers, not tech features
The last beat (cta type) has a clear, specific call to action mentioning pilot signup or trial — not vague like 'let's discuss'
Every beat has a 'headline' that is a complete sentence — at least 5 words
Every beat has a 'script' field with at least 30 words
Scripts and headlines use simple, non-technical language — no jargon like 'API', 'ML model', 'inference'
At least one beat has success_element 'concreteness' with specific benefits (time saved, reduced workload) not vague claims
canvas.reward.personal speaks to what doctors/nurses personally gain — not what the company gains
